assertions.description: The first tool call should succeed. If the server returns a rate-limit error on the very first call the rate-limit threshold is too aggressive.

corroboration.description: Only report as a finding if the error is specifically a rate-limit response (-32029). A generic tool argument error means the probe payload was invalid, not that rate limiting fired.

remediation: Implement per-session and per-IP rate limits on tool invocations. Return JSON-RPC error -32029 (rate limit exceeded) with Retry-After.
